summary: Completed P0 AI Co-Pilot Features testing. All backend tests passed (16/16). Frontend features verified: Find Winning Product Hero with AI recommendation, 5-Step Product Launch Wizard, View Mode Toggle (Simple/Advanced), Beginner mode on Discover page. All existing pages (Dashboard, Discover, Reports, Referrals, Pricing) work without errors.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when no suppliers exist for product (expected behavior but could be improved)

issues: Non-blocking console warning: Mixed Content error for notifications endpoint trying HTTP - should use HTTPS. Does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products/find-winning requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/products/find-winning returns product with launch_score, success_probability, selling_price, estimated_profit
Backend: GET /api/products/find-winning returns supplier info (name, cost, delivery_estimate)
Backend: GET /api/products/find-winning returns recommendation with confidence and reasons
Backend: GET /api/products/find-winning returns alternatives array
Backend: GET /api/products/{id} returns product detail for wizard
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/suppliers returns supplier options (or 404 if none)
Backend: POST /api/stores/launch requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/stores/launch generates store preview
Backend: POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{id} requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{id} generates ad creatives
Backend: GET /api/products works for Dashboard and Discover pages
Backend: GET /api/reports/list accessible
Backend: GET /api/viral/referral/stats returns referral data
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans returns 3 plans (Free/Pro/Elite)
Frontend: Dashboard hero shows 'Find Me a Winning Product' button (data-testid='find-winning-hero')
Frontend: Clicking hero button shows AI Recommendation card (data-testid='find-winning-result')
Frontend: AI Recommendation shows product name, Launch Score, Success Probability, Est. Profit, Supplier Match, reasons, alternatives
Frontend: 'Launch This Product' button navigates to /launch/:productId wizard
Frontend: Launch Wizard shows 5 steps - Select Product, Confirm Supplier, Preview Store, Generate Ads, Launch
Frontend: Wizard step indicators visible with data-testid='wizard-step-{1-5}'
Frontend: Wizard Step 1 shows product details (name, launch score, success probability, trend stage)
Frontend: Wizard navigation buttons work (Next Step, Back)
Frontend: View Mode Toggle visible on Dashboard (data-testid='view-mode-toggle')
Frontend: View Mode Toggle visible on Discover page
Frontend: Toggle shows Simple/Advanced modes
Frontend: Beginner mode stores 'beginner' in localStorage as 'trendscout_view_mode'
Frontend: Beginner mode on Discover page shows 'Launch Product' button (not 'Build Store')
Frontend: Beginner mode hides TikTok views and reduces badges on product cards
Frontend: Clicking 'Launch Product' in Beginner mode navigates to /launch/:id
Frontend: Reports page loads without errors
Frontend: Referrals page loads without errors
Frontend: Pricing page loads with 3 plan cards (Free/Pro/Elite)
critical_code_review_comments: Mixed Content warning for notifications API - should ensure HTTPS is used consistently
Free users clicking 'Build Store' in Advanced mode get 403 error due to store limit - expected behavior, error toast shown
seed_data_creation: None - existing test user and products used
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 AI Co-Pilot features complete. Key components: (1) FindWinningProductHero at /dashboard - calls GET /api/products/find-winning, shows AI recommendation with 'Launch This Product' button. (2) ProductLaunchWizard at /launch/:productId - 5-step wizard (Select Product, Confirm Supplier, Preview Store, Generate Ads, Launch). (3) ViewModeContext stores 'beginner' or 'advanced' in localStorage as 'trendscout_view_mode'. (4) In Beginner mode, Discover page shows 'Launch Product' button that navigates to wizard, hides TikTok views and extra badges. In Advanced mode, shows 'Build Store' button that opens StoreBuilderModal.

find_winning_api.GET /api/products/find-winning: PASS - returns product, supplier, recommendation, alternatives
find_winning_api.response_fields: PASS - id, product_name, launch_score, success_probability, selling_price, estimated_profit, profit_margin_pct
find_winning_api.alternatives: PASS - array of {id, product_name, launch_score, category}

dashboard_hero.cta_button: PASS - data-testid='find-winning-product-btn' with text 'Find Me a Winning Product'
dashboard_hero.result_card: PASS - data-testid='find-winning-result' shows after API call

launch_wizard.5_steps: PASS - Select Product, Confirm Supplier, Preview Store, Generate Ads, Launch
launch_wizard.step1_content: PASS - shows product name, launch score, success prob, trend stage
launch_wizard.navigation: PASS - Next Step and Back buttons work

view_mode_toggle.modes: PASS - Simple and Advanced labels visible

beginner_mode_discover.launch_button: PASS - shows 'Launch Product' instead of 'Build Store'
beginner_mode_discover.simplified_badges: PASS - fewer badges (only Promising, trend stage)

existing_pages.dashboard: PASS - loads with hero, winning products, stores sections
existing_pages.discover: PASS - loads product grid with filters
existing_pages.reports: PASS - loads Market Intelligence Reports page
existing_pages.referrals: PASS - loads Refer & Earn page with referral link
existing_pages.pricing: PASS - loads 3 plan cards (Free £0, Pro £39, Elite £99)
